channel.title: bayesian-optimisation on wil oc ward | university of sheffield
channel.description: Recent content in bayesian-optimisation on wil oc ward | university of sheffield

item.title: Physically Constrained Machine Learning for Non-linear Spatio-temporal Partial Differential Equations
item.description: This project was an EPSRC feasibility study, looking at applying probabilistic machine learning approaches to non-linear partial differential equations, particularly the Cahn-Hilliard model for polymer demixing. The work involved reviewing methods for physics-constrained learning, and developing a Bayesian optimisation framework to infer system parameters from differentiable simulation-based solvers.
